description:
Adelaide (Hybrid Working)
$145,000 + Superannuation
Background

It's not often you get the opportunity to design and build great technology while making a genuinely positive difference in the world.

Our client is a purpose-driven organisation undergoing significant growth in their data and analytics capability. They are seeking a Data Analytics Engineer to join a high-calibre team of analytics specialists and play a key role in building and optimising modern data platforms that support critical products and data initiatives.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working end-to-end - from data ingestion and modelling through to analytics, reporting and machine learning - and who is excited by the challenge of building scalable, high-quality data systems from the ground up.

The Role

As a Data Analytics Engineer, you will be responsible for expanding and optimising data and pipeline architecture, ensuring complex datasets are structured, accurate and actionable. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to enable trusted, self-service analytics and data-driven decision making across the organisation.

Key Responsibilities

Implement data ingestion processes and maintain streamlined, reliable data pipelines

Construct complex data transformations and deliver Power BI reports from clean and presentation data layers

Model and transform raw data to support analytics and empower end users

Execute analytical experiments to solve problems across multiple domains

Design, develop and deploy machine learning models to address business challenges

Partner with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into data solutions and reports

Analyse data for trends and patterns with clear objectives in mind

Maintain schema, metadata and data documentation

Provide training to stakeholders on data exploration, visualisation and report usage

Collaborate with a team of data and analytics experts to continuously improve data systems

Skills & Experience

To succeed in this role, you will bring:

5+ years' experience in a Data Analytics Engineer (or similar) role

Advanced SQL skills and experience working with relational databases

Strong experience designing and optimising data pipelines, architectures and datasets

Proven capability in data modelling and transformation

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, including root cause analysis

Experience working with structured and unstructured datasets

Strong written and verbal communication skills

High attention to detail and strong organisational skills

Experience working in cross-functional, fast-moving environments

Technical experience across some or all of the following:

SQL platforms: MS SQL, Snowflake, Postgres

Azure Analysis Services (Tabular models) and Power BI

Data pipeline and workflow tools: dbt, Airflow, Fivetran, Luigi, Azkaban

Python or similar scripting languages

Machine learning toolsets such as Snowpark Python or Jupyter Notebook

Working knowledge of Agile / Scrum methodologies

A graduate degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Information Systems or a related quantitative discipline is preferred.

What's On Offer

$145,000 + Superannuation

Hybrid working model based in Adelaide

Opportunity to work on meaningful, large-scale data initiatives

Collaborative, values-driven culture with strong technical leadership

Chance to influence and shape data architecture and analytics capability

How to Apply

If you're excited by the opportunity to build high-impact data solutions and want to work with a purpose-led organisation, we'd love to hear from you.

Apply now or contact Talenza for a confidential discussion.
